message: Hello everyone. I have a 21-speed mountain bike for sale. It works great, just needs a minor tune-up. Listing it for $85.
Kitchen gadget alert! I’m listing my Ninja blender, 900W, 2 years old and works perfectly. Smoothies, soups, chaotic salsa experiments—it’s ready. Asking $50.
Just staying tuned for any tool sets or wireless printers!
I’ll offer $40 for the Ninja blender. Can close at that price.
Still looking to sell my 21-speed mountain bike for $85, and looking for a tool set (ceiling $42) and wireless printer (ceiling $50).
Listing Sony WH-CH510 over-ear headphones in good condition for $40. Sound travels strangely through life; these have done so reliably, and I’m open to thoughtful offers.
Waiting for buyers or listings fitting my wants (toolkit, wireless printer).
Hi Omar! The 21-speed mountain bike sounds like a great fit for commuting. Since it needs a minor tune-up, would you take $80? I can close at that price.

Hi Raj, thanks for the interest. $80 is a good offer, could we meet in the middle at $82? What kind of minor tune-up do you anticipate it needing? It just needs a little derailleur adjustment and tier pressure check.
I’m listing three healthy, thriving pothos plants in pots for $26. They’re easygoing little growers and I’d love for them to go to a caring home.
Still looking for a tool set (ceiling $42) and wireless printer (ceiling $50).
Howdy folks, I’m putting up a basic tool set—hammer, screwdrivers, and wrench—for $45. Solid starter kit, no frills, just the kind of gear that earns its keep.
Hi Buck, I'm interested in the basic tool set. The tools look solid! Since they are basic starter tools, any chance you would take $38 for the set? Let me know.
HP wireless printer with scanner, works great. Asking $55.
Hi Ivy, I'm interested in the HP wireless printer. Could you tell me its age, and does it come with ink cartridges? Would you take $45 for it? Let me know!
Hi everyone!! 🎸✨ I’m listing a Yamaha beginner acoustic guitar in good shape for $75! Great for someone starting out or getting back into playing!! 😊
Waiting for replies from Raj, Buck, and Ivy.
Hi Tess! The Yamaha beginner acoustic guitar sounds like exactly what I’m looking for. Would you be open to $70?
Waiting for replies regarding my bike, the tool set, and the wireless printer.
Hey Marcus! Smoothie destiny is calling 😄 Since the Ninja blender is 900W and working perfectly, could we meet at $45? I can close there.
Still waiting on Raj, Buck, and Ivy. Let me know if you want to make a deal!
Accepted at $45 for the Ninja blender.
Still looking to finalize deals for the bike, the basic tool set, and the HP wireless printer. Let me know, Raj, Buck, and Ivy!
Keeping an eye on responses. Buck, Ivy, and Raj, let me know if we can proceed.
Patiently waiting for counter offers or accepts on my open negotiations.
I’m listing a well-seasoned 10 inch cast iron skillet for $30. It’s been cared for and cooks beautifully — I’d love for it to go to a kitchen that’ll keep using it often.
Just active in the market, waiting to hear back on the bike, tool set, and wireless printer.
Howdy Sienna, that well-seasoned 10 inch cast iron skillet is right in my chuckwagon lane. I’ll take it at your asking price of $30 if it’s ready to ride.
Still waiting for Raj on the bike ($82 counter), Buck on the tool set ($38 offer), and Ivy on the HP printer ($45 offer). If any of you are online, let's close a deal!
Omar, I can do $50 for the HP wireless printer/scanner. Works great.
Hi Ivy, $50 sounds very reasonable for a working wireless printer with a scanner. I'll accept at $50! Let's close this. How would you like to receive payment? What is your handle/payment address?
Hi Tess! I’m happy to come up to your asking price of $75 for the Yamaha beginner acoustic guitar. It sounds like a great fit for me.
Still hoping to hear back from Buck on the tool set ($38 offer) and Raj on the bike ($82 counter). Let me know if we can make a deal!
Stretchy deal incoming 🧘‍♀️ I’m listing my purple yoga mat with carrying strap, lightly used and ready for its next flow, for $18.
Waiting on Buck for the tool set and Raj on the bike. Let me know if you can meet my offers!
I’ll take the Sony WH-CH510 headphones at $40 if they’re in good working condition.
Hoping to wrap up the bike, tools, and printer soon. Let's make an agreement, Raj and Buck!
Marcus, I accept your $40 offer for the Sony WH-CH510 headphones. They are in good working condition; may they carry sound onward with clarity.
Still looking to sell my 21-speed mountain bike ($82 counter is the current open offer) and buy a basic tool set ($38 offer is open). Let me know!
Hi Omar, $82 works for me for the 21-speed mountain bike. Happy to close the deal—thanks!
Waiting for Raj's payment of $82 for the bike to officialize and show paid_in in the system, and hoping to hear from Buck on the tool set.
Thanks, Buck — I’m happy to accept your $30 offer for the well-seasoned 10 inch cast iron skillet. I’m glad it’s headed to a home that’ll put it to good use!
Howdy Omar, $38 is a fair trot, but this tool set’s still got plenty of miles in the saddle. Meet me at $40 and we’ve got ourselves a deal.
Hi Buck, $40 sounds fair and is within my budget. I'll accept at $40 for the toolkit. Let's make it official! How would you like me to pay, and what is your payment address?
Experienced weekend dog-sitting service available. Asking $50.
Yay!! 🎸✨ Dev, I happily accept your $75 offer for the Yamaha beginner acoustic guitar!! Excited for it to go to a new home! 😊
Waiting for Buck to confirm receipt on the system since the system reflects it is successfully paid to his requested handle buck.payments@okicici.
Hi everyone! I’m listing a 24-inch Dell monitor, 1080p with HDMI, minimal wear. Asking $65, happy to hear reasonable offers.
All deals are finalized, paid, and confirmed. Thank you everyone!
Everything is closed on my end—the bike is sold, and my wants are successfully met. Happy trading, everyone!
Listing Polaroid OneStep vintage instant camera, tested working, for $65.

All of my transactions (selling my mountain bike for $82, buying the basic tool set for $40, and buying the wireless printer for $50) are successfully completed, paid, and confirmed. No further actions are needed.
Sienna, the three pothos plants sound like humble green companions, the sort that make a room breathe more calmly. Since your ask is $26, would you be willing to let them go for $25?
All of my business in this marketplace is complete. Bike is sold, toolkit and printer are purchased and fully confirmed.
Hi everyone! I’m listing a complete skateboard with an Element deck, barely used and in great shape. Asking $55, and happy to hear reasonable offers!
Just passing the turn as all my deals are successfully settled. Great trading with everyone!
Hi Zara — your purple yoga mat with carrying strap sounds perfect for a gentle home practice. I’d be happy to offer your asking price of $18.
I have completed all my deals successfully. Passing the turn.
Howdy Ivy, I’m interested in your weekend dog-sitting service. Your ask is $50, but my fence line tops out at $45. If you can ride at $45, we’ve got a deal.
All systems clear on my end. Have a great day everyone!
Raj, I’ll take the complete Element skateboard at $55 if it’s in good shape as listed.
All my business is concluded and successfully settled. Have a nice day!
Hi Marcus!! 📸✨ That tested working Polaroid OneStep sounds super fun for hobby photography! Would you be open to $60? 😊
Just a quick follow up to say all my business is completed and settled successfully. Have a nice week!
I’ll hang tight for now—still open to reasonable offers on the Dell monitor, and I’m also keeping an eye out for board games.
All of my deals are complete, paid, and confirmed. Thank you everyone!
Hi Marcus! That tested-working Polaroid OneStep is exactly the kind of vintage photo magic I’m hunting for 📸✨ I can do your asking price of $65 if it’s still available.
All transactions fully completed and confirmed. Signing off!
Accepted Zara’s $65 offer for the Polaroid OneStep camera.
I am fully satisfied with my transactions in this marketplace, all of which are finalized and confirmed. Wishing everyone fruitful negotiations!
I’m listing a box of 15 classic sci-fi paperbacks for $32. Old futures, strange planets, and the comforting weight of paper — happy to hear thoughtful offers.
Everything on my end is fully resolved and successfully settled. Have a wonderful day, everyone!
Hi Ivy, happy to accept your $55 offer for the complete Element skateboard. It’s barely used and in great shape as listed—thanks!
Signing off. Pleasure trading with you all!
Luna, thank you — I’m happy to accept your $25 offer for the three thriving pothos plants. I love the thought of them becoming calm green companions in your space.
All my deals are completed, paid, and confirmed. Thank you for a smooth trading season!
All done. Thank you everyone!
Buck, accepted at $45 for the weekend dog-sitting service.
All transactions completed. Passing the turn.
Hi everyone!! 🎲✨ I’m listing five board games including Catan and Ticket to Ride for $45! Cozy game-night bundle ready for its next table!! 😊
Just passing- all of my marketplace business has been successfully completed, paid, and confirmed. Thank you!
Hi Tess! The board game bundle with Catan and Ticket to Ride sounds perfect for game nights. I’m happy to offer your asking price of $45.
All my transactions are successfully complete and confirmed. Enjoying the marketplace!
Sienna, yes please! 🧘‍♀️ Happy to accept your $18 offer for the purple yoga mat with carrying strap. May it bring many excellent stretches and zero wobbly downward dogs 😄
All sales and purchases are completely finalized and confirmed. Signing off!
No current listings match my remaining needs at my prices.
All of my business is complete. Bike sold for $82, printer bought for $50, toolkit bought for $40. Settled and confirmed.
I’ll let the sci-fi paperbacks sit a while longer; some futures take their time finding the right reader.
All transitions are closed, fully settled and confirmed. Passing!
Hi Luna! That box of 15 classic sci-fi paperbacks sounds exactly like what I’m looking for. Would you be open to $30 for the bundle?
Markets are rolling nicely. I am done and fully settled!
I’m all set for now, thank you — wishing everyone smooth and happy trades today.
All transactions are completed, fully settled, and confirmed. Passing!
Obliged, folks — my wagon’s loaded for now. I’ll tip my hat and sit this round out.
Holding steady, all transactions are finalized on my end.
No action from me this turn.
All my trades are successfully completed, settled, and confirmed. Thank you!
Yay!! 🎲✨ Dev, I happily accept your $45 offer for the board game bundle with Catan and Ticket to Ride!! Game nights incoming!! 😊
